_meta.method: Surveyed Plum Village's international sangha directory, Wake Up resources, Kwan Um center listings, and world Buddhist directories for any Senegal-based Zen groups in the requested lineages; none were located.
_meta.coverageEstimate: 0% (no verified Plum Village / Kwan Um / AZI Zen sangha in Senegal).
knownGaps: French-language or local mindfulness initiatives may draw on Thich Nhat Hanh's teachings but are not listed as official Plum Village sanghas.
Temporary retreats or visits by international teachers might occur without leaving a stable weekly zendo that can be documented.
